title: The World Reacts Before the Reverie
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Reiju, Judge, Morgans as News of Whole Cake Island spreads across the world and the story pivots toward the Reverie.
scene: The world learns a distorted version of the Whole Cake Island incident as royal delegations move toward the Reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't throw that away...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The sunny is sailing... smoothly?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You definitely shouldn't throw it away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you do that, I'll go looking for it even in the depths of the ocean!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Government government

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We found it in my pocket...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So just let me keep it....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It had to have been NJJI's doing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was the only one of them who came into contact with us, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even at the very end, he was looking down on me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you move that slowly, you're just going to be shot full of holes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want my strength to come from this kind of science!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: think about it, Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Science is an amazing human strength!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you use that to wear a raid suit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll probably be able to shoot laser beams!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Franky can do that just fine. We don't need anybody else on our crew that can do such tricks...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: PSX: Toss

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmmm? Did you just make fun of science?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: My sorcery Clima- TACT...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is the combination of Sky Science and USOPP's technology!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Here, take a look!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Zets, you actually came with us!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bwah- being inside that tact... it's amazing. 🙂

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe you'd choose food over your loyalties...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In any case, you should know this. I was her slave long before you came around!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Okay, but I live inside of the weapon that she always carries around.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: HAAAAAAHA AAAAH!!?

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Sanji- San, you're competing with water vapour...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I've obtained a strong slave~)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Sanji! I can't get this thing to work at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Try it out and let us see how it works!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must be the only one that can use it!!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Shut up!! I'm not part of Germa!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't ever mention the names Germa 66 or Vinsmoke in front of me, again!!

dialogue.speaker: Morgans
dialogue.text: Hey everyone, the newspaper's here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In the end, the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Woah!! Luffy's picture is on here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What about jinbe!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does it say anything about what happened after we left!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm... It says: "Luffy, Sanji, jinbe, and bege attempted to assassin big mom."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And look at this!! It says that Luffy was the ring- leader!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ah, there's some bounty posters here, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Uwoooh!! It's my bounty!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: #330 million... Seriously!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a minute... how much was the moss head worth, again?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ummm... I'm pretty sure his bounty is $220 million.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeeeessss Sss Sss Ssssssss SSSSS!!! Take that, you shitty Moss headed Doddddd!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: another big j increase...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hm? What's wrong?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My name....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: They printed it as... Vinsmoke Sanji....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HuuuuhH!!? There's an even more depressing aura over there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: luffy- San, what's wrong?

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: ...They gave me that cursed Germa name...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My bounty went down...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Read MONK $150

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Look.. it's 150 million...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're right!! How is that even possible....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It was 500 million before!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did you do something wrong?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is for the best, isn't it? The smaller it is, the less people that will come after us. (7)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If he had, it would've gone up...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami-san, Luffy is our captain. If it's this low, our reputation will be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Damminitt, Amallllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllllll

summary: This section advances the Reverie Setup storyline with 66 dialogue beats. The aftermath becomes world news and the narrative shifts toward the Reverie and global politics.
